title: pelargonium × gossypiifolium
intro: Pelargonium × gossypiifolium, a popular species of pelargonium, is a hybrid plant known for its unique cotton-like leaves and fragrant flowers. The leaves of this plant have been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat a variety of ailments, including fever, coughs, and skin irritations, due to their antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The medicinal properties of Pelargonium × gossypiifolium have been shown to provide several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, soothing respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing. The leaves can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
